features: Launched by the design house of Jo Malone in the year of 2005
This floral fruity gourmand fragrance has a blend of green notes, black currant, petitgrain, nectarin, black locust, vetiver, peach, and plum
It is recommended for daily wear.
description: Product Description Launched by the design house of Jo Malone in the year of 2005. This floral fruity gourmand fragrance has a blend of green notes, black currant, petitgrain, nectarin, black locust, vetiver, peach, and plum. Ingredients Alcohol Denat., Fragrance (Parfum), Water\Aqua\Eau, Bht, Limonene, Linalool, Citronellol, Citral Directions Apply 1-2 sprays to pulse points such as wrists, neck, and behind the ears. Safety Warning Keep in cool and dry place. See more
